# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.axway.com/v2
kind: NetworkFilterConfig
metadata:
  name: my-service-mesh
spec:
  filters:
    filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.http.router
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3alpha.Router
          routers:
            - name: my-router
              config:
                action: REDIRECT
                cluster: my-service
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: my-http-connections
          codec_system: BOOST_ASIO
          route_configuration:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
              - name: my-service
                domains: ["*"]
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/"
                    route:
                      cluster: my-cluster
          transport_socket:
            name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.TransportSocket
              common_tls_context:
                tls_certificates:
                  - certified_name: my-service-cert
                    certificate_chain: ... # Certificate chain data
                    private_key: ... # Private key data
              connection_pool:
                max_connections_per_host_setting:
                  value: 100
                  type: EXACT
                max_connections_percent: 100
              upstream:
                service_cluster: my-cluster
          http2_protocol_options: {}
      - name: envoy.filters.http.retry_policy
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.retry_policy.v3.RetryPolicy
          total_timeout_ms: 5000
          num_retries: 5
      - name: envoy.filters.http.transport_socket
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.transport_sockets.v3.TransportSocket
          codec_type: BOOST_ASIO
          transport_socket:
            name: envoy.transport_sockets.tcp
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tcp.v3.TransportSocket
              connection_pool:
                max_connections_per_host_setting:
                  value: 100
                  type: EXACT
                max_connections_percent: 100
